title: Fix payment deep links opening WhatsApp instead of GPay/PhonePe/Paytm

requirements.text: Fix the UPI payment deep links in UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx so that clicking GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm buttons opens the correct respective payment app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm) instead of WhatsApp. Use the correct platform-specific UPI URI schemes: 'tez://upi/pay?' for GPay, 'phonepe://pay?' for PhonePe, and 'paytmmp://pay?' for Paytm. Do not change any other UI, layout, or functionality.

quotes: Instead of opening gpay phone pe and paytm while clicking on payment its opening whatsapp . Rectify that

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the GPay button opens the GPay app (or GPay's UPI deep link URL) and does not open WhatsApp
Clicking the PhonePe button opens the PhonePe app (or PhonePe's UPI deep link URL) and does not open WhatsApp
Clicking the Paytm button opens the Paytm app (or Paytm's UPI deep link URL) and does not open WhatsApp
No other UI components, pages, or functionality are changed
The fix applies to both UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx if both build deep links

constraints: Do not change any UI layout, styling, or other interface elements
Do not modify any pages, components, or logic unrelated to the payment deep link URLs
Only fix the incorrect deep link/URL scheme that was causing WhatsApp to open
nonGoals: Changing the payment flow or confirmation logic
Modifying the cart, menu, or admin panel
